results.natural_proof:
Proof of: √2 is irrational (proof by contradiction)

We prove by contradiction.
Assume {negation}. Then {consequence1}.
But this contradicts {consequence2}.
Therefore {conclusion}.

Domain: logic
Approach: Using Mathematical Logic techniques.
results.lean_code:
theorem e0038 √2 is irrational (proof by contradiction) := by
  by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  -- Derive contradiction
  have c1 : contradiction 1 := by sorry
  have c2 : contradiction 2 := by sorry
  exact absurd c1 (fun _ => c2) sorry
